app.name: Hyaecord
session.freshLoginNotice: You just connected. Discord's systems can sometimes flag a brand-new login that sends a message right away — you might want to wait a few minutes before sending your first one.
moderator.noPermission: You don't have permission to manage channels here.
moderator.entered: Moderator View — select channels, then hold to delete. Esc to exit.
moderator.holdToDelete: Hold to feed to the den
chomper.hidden: {name} hidden and muted. Swipe left on a server icon or DM any time, or restore it in Settings.
message.pinNotice: pinned a message to this channel.
profile.title: User profile
composer.silentOn: Sending silently (recipients get no notification for the next message)
composer.readOnly: You don't have permission to send messages in this channel
gifPicker.title: GIF picker
stickerPicker.title: Sticker picker
emojiPicker.title: Emoji picker
messageSearch.title: Search messages
messageSearch.indexing: Still indexing this guild's messages — try again in a moment.
pins.title: Pinned Messages
pins.empty: No pinned messages in this channel yet.
friends.title: Friends
friends.addCaution: Sending several friend requests in a short time can trigger Discord's spam detection — space them out if you're adding a few people.
settings.chomper.showHidden.description: Swiping a server icon or DM hides and mutes it. Turning this on shows them again and un-mutes them; turning it off re-hides and re-mutes the same set.
settings.communityTheme.description: Using the default theme's own colours.
themeStore.title: Community Theme Store
themeStore.subtitle: Every theme ships a light and a dark version — layout and motion stay the same, only colours change. Submitted and reviewed by the community, hosted free on GitHub.
themeStore.searchPlaceholder: Search themes by name or author…
themeStore.empty: Couldn't reach the theme registry — check your connection and try again later.
themeStore.reverted: Back to the default theme colours.
themeStore.submit.body: Made your own palette? Submit it for review — it costs nothing and takes a few minutes.
login.title: Connect to Discord
login.welcomeBody: This opens Discord's own real login page — never a form of ours asking for your password. It includes Discord's own QR-code scan option too, right there on the page.
login.vpnNotice: Looks like you might be using a VPN. Discord's login sometimes throws up extra verification for VPN connections — if login gets stuck, try disabling it and retrying.
login.error.network: Couldn't reach Discord. Check your connection and try again.
login.sessionOnly: No system keyring was found, so this login lasts until you quit — nothing was written to disk.
wizard.title: Welcome to Hyaecord
wizard.subtitle: Let's get you set up. Everything here is optional and explained in plain language.
wizard.theme.title: Theme
wizard.theme.detected.gnome: GNOME detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.theme.detected.kde: KDE Plasma detected — matching your system theme.
wizard.import.title: Import existing login
wizard.import.body: Hyaecord can import your session from Discord, Vesktop, or Equibop so you don't have to log in again.
wizard.integrations.title: Built-in features
wizard.integrations.body: UserPFP, UsrBG, GlobalBadges and RPC Bridge are on by default. Each one can be turned off any time in Settings.
wizard.telemetry.title: Anonymous usage stats
wizard.telemetry.body: Hyaecord sends one small anonymous ping a day — a random ID, app version, OS, and desktop environment. That's how we know how many people use Hyaecord and what to support. It is never linked to your Discord account and contains no messages or personal data. Turn it off here or in Settings at any time.
wizard.tos.title: Before you continue
wizard.tos.body: Hyaecord is a third-party client. Client modifications are against Discord's Terms of Service. Hyaecord ships nothing abusive, but use is at your own discretion.
wizard.import.soon: Importing isn't available yet — it arrives before the first stable release. You can log in normally in the meantime.
settings.title: Settings
settings.accounts.merge.description: Shows every connected platform's servers together, each with a small platform badge. Turn off to view one platform at a time.
settings.account.error: Couldn't update your avatar. Try again.
settings.voice.description: Test your camera, microphone, and screen-share sources. These are previews only — joining a voice channel shows who else is connected, but actually sending/receiving audio or video isn't built yet.
mediaPreview.note: This is a local preview only — nothing is being sent anywhere. Closing this window stops the camera/capture.
mediaPreview.micNote: This is a local level meter only — nothing is being sent anywhere. Closing this window stops the microphone.
screenShare.title: Choose what to share
plugins.empty: No plugins found. Drop a .js file into your Hyaecord plugins folder to add one — see PLUGIN_GUIDELINES.md.
plugins.portedFrom: Behaviour reimplemented from {source}'s "{original}" plugin against Hyaecord's own plugin API — not the original code, see PLUGIN_PARITY.md
settings.support.description: Starring the repo helps more than you'd think — it's how people find the project.
settings.credits.intro: Hyaecord is an independent, open-source client — not made by, affiliated with, or endorsed by Discord Inc. or the Stoat project. Built on these real open-source projects:
settings.credits.disclaimer: "Discord" and "Stoat" are trademarks of their respective owners.
settings.credits.contributorsEmpty: Couldn't load contributors right now — check your connection.
settings.credits.stoatHelpersEmpty: No Stoat-specific contributors yet — Stoat support is new. This section is here for real people who help with it in the future, not a placeholder.
settings.selfPinFade.description: Notices for messages you pin fade out after a short delay.
settings.developerMode.description: Adds "Copy ID" to the right-click menu on servers, channels, messages, and profiles.
feature.userPFP.description: Show community profile pictures from the UserPFP database.
feature.usrBG.description: Show custom profile backgrounds from the UsrBG database.
feature.globalBadges.description: Show contributor badges from other client mods, plus the Hyaecord Contributor badge.
feature.rpcBridge.description: Let games and other apps set your Rich Presence without the official client.
settings.gamingMode.off: Off. Mentions, DMs, and calls always keep working regardless of this setting.
settings.gamingMode.unavailable: Can't detect fullscreen apps on this system (needs X11 or XWayland) — the toggle won't do anything here yet.
settings.gamingMode.watching: Watching for a fullscreen app. Not currently active.
settings.gamingMode.active: Active — a fullscreen app was detected.
settings.telemetry.description: One anonymous ping a day: random ID, version, OS, desktop environment. Never linked to your Discord account. Off means off — nothing is sent.
settings.holdToDisable: Hold the switch to turn off.
